PgvectorExtensions.fs.reason: The uncovered lines are non-executable: the `PgvectorFn.*_distance` members are `sqlFn` marker stubs (the visitor matches the call-site shape and never invokes the body), and the `OrderByIgnored`/`failwith` arms of OrderByVectorDistance are defensive — the `[<ProjectionParameter>]` column selector always resolves to OrderByColumn, so they are unreachable through the public CE.
